description: You have received a miniaturized site plan that imported at the wrong scale. 1. Measure the line labeled 'Reference: 20m' to confirm it is incorrect (it currently measures about 1m). 2. Use the Tape Measure tool to rescale the entire model so that the reference line becomes exactly 20 meters long. 3. Extrude the L-shaped building footprint upward to a height of 6 meters. 4. Use Skelion to install a flat-roof solar array on the new roof. 5. Save the corrected model to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\scaled_project.skp'.
